designSystem.style: Dark-first food app with vibrant green accent. Deep dark greens for surfaces, luminous primary green for CTAs and highlights. Rescue recipe pattern with amber warnings and red urgency indicators. Card-based layout with freshness progress bars and match percentage badges.

screens: Pantry - Live inventory with freshness bars, categories (Fridge/Pantry/Freezer), urgency tiers, and quick-add strip (Camera/Receipt/Voice/Manual)
Recipes - Suggested and Rescue recipe tabs with match %, ingredient lists, difficulty, cook time, and full step-by-step detail view
Alerts - Waste prevention score card, critical use-today items with cook suggestions, use-this-week list with dismissal
Plan - Weekly meal planner grid, AI-predicted run-outs, shareable shopping checklist, household member dietary preferences
Settings - Theme toggle (dark/light), notification toggles, household management, units, and monthly food-saving impact stats
